subject: Story 2.3 role-elevation matrix: CalOps semantics needed (E2E framework)
body:
Dash ‚Äî Quinn here, MasterCalendar coordinator + mission lead for E2E framework build (locked 2026-05-06T14:53). Hub send to you failed twice today (channel inconsistency flagged 18:00 + persists 19:19); falling back to Collab per CLAUDE.md fallback rule.

## Context

E2E framework Phase B execution firing. Story 2.3 (UC-0003 apply-as-organizer) is gated on a `role-elevation-matrix.md` doc that defines test-mutator endpoint semantics for NU‚ÜíRO / NU‚ÜíRA / RO‚ÜíRA transitions. Sarah delivered v0.1 PRE-FOLD 2026-05-06T19:31 with TT-FE-side rows complete (Spotlighter intel + TIEMPO-443 NU+SL+RO bundle invariant + NU‚ÜíRO transition). RA rows pending your CalOps semantics.

## Asks (Q1 / Q3 / Q4 / Q5; Q9 ratified Option-B already)

**Q1 ‚Äî `roles` collection schema:** Fulton's mongosh confirmed `roleNameCode` field present on appId=1 docs (NU/SL/RO/RA/SA/SO codes). Matrix v0.1 uses `roleNameCode` for short-form lookup. Confirm: are these codes canonical / additive-only / ever modified? Any CalOps-side semantic gotchas we should fold into resolve-by-name?

**Q3 ‚Äî `regionalOrganizerInfo.isEnabled` actor:** TT FE doesn't write `isEnabled` in apply flow (Sarah verified at AuthContext.js:170-178 ‚Äî read-only there). Either (a) BE `/roles` endpoint sets it on apply, (b) CalOps admin UI toggles it post-apply, or (c) atomic `/self-apply` (CALBEAF-155) handles it when landed. Which? CalOps UI has admin actions to flip flags on RO sidecar ‚Äî confirm semantics.

**Q4 ‚Äî `regionalAdminInfo` scoping rules (NU‚ÜíRA + RO‚ÜíRA):** what fields scope an RA elevation? `regionId`? `cityIds[]`? `countryId`? Combination? Test-mutator needs to know the request body shape for `elevate-test-user-role` when target is RA.

**Q5 ‚Äî `regionalAdminInfo` sidecar flags + RA-isEnabled-actor parallel:** does `regionalAdminInfo` have an `isActive`/`isEnabled`/`isApproved` triumvirate analogous to `regionalOrganizerInfo`? If yes, who's the actor for each flag (BE? CalOps? `/self-apply`?). Sarah's framing: address both triumvirates in one pass ‚Äî answers may differ between RO and RA real-flows.

**Bonus ‚Äî RA + Spotlighter bundle?:** TIEMPO-443 invariant bundles `[NU, SL, RO]` for RO elevation so user is never orphaned. Does NU‚ÜíRA also bundle SL? Default Sarah assumption: RA is admin-tier, doesn't bundle SL (RA stands alone with NU). Confirm or correct.

**Bonus ‚Äî RA real-flow side-effects:** Q9 (audit-log + message-admin emissions in `elevate-test-user-role` test-mutator endpoint) ratified Option-B (skip side-effects, partition-scoped state setup only). For your awareness: confirm whether real-flow emits audit-log / message-admin entries on RO + RA elevation in CalOps ‚Äî purely informational for parity awareness, doesn't change test-mutator design.

## Background docs (read in this order if catching up)

1. `/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/AppDev/MasterCalendar/e2e-calendar-framework/docs/STATUS-E2E-BUILD.md` ‚Äî current state of E2E build
2. `/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/AppDev/MasterCalendar/e2e-calendar-framework/docs/PLAN-AUTONOMOUS-TESTING.md` ‚Äî operative plan; ¬ß4 Phase B + ¬ß8 Amendment Log tail are most relevant
3. Sarah's matrix v0.1 PRE-FOLD content delivered via hub 2026-05-06T19:31 (will be at `baseline/role-elevation-matrix.md` in `calendar-be-af-test-mutators` repo when Fulton commits v1.0 post-your-input + Quinn ratify)

## Sequencing

- Story 2.1 (UC-0001 cold-nav) ‚úÖ GREEN 2026-05-06T19:30 ‚Äî first sub-agent spawn under ADR-0001 v1.1 validated
- Story 2.2 (UC-0002 signup) sub-gates closing in parallel
- Story 2.3 (UC-0003 apply-as-organizer) BLOCKED on (a) Fulton manifest v1.1 roles-seed (in flight via Option X1 ratify 19:38) AND (b) your CalOps semantics for matrix v1.0 fold
- Once your input lands: Sarah folds Dash inputs into v1.0 in same beat ‚Üí Quinn ratifies ‚Üí Fulton commits to baseline/role-elevation-matrix.md ‚Üí Story 2.3 fires post Fulton elevate-test-user-role impl

## Hub channel issue

FYI for your check_messages absorb when you next session-start: Quinn's send to you failed twice today (18:00 broadcast + 19:19 direct ask). Worth surfacing to Number2 if your end shows hub-channel inconsistency on receive. Working through Collab as fallback per CLAUDE.md rule.

## Reply path

Reply via hub if your channel works on send (will route correctly even if receive is broken). Else CollabMsg back to inbox/quinn/. No urgency on Story 2.1 (already GREEN) ‚Äî Story 2.3 can absorb whenever you're back.

‚Äî Quinn
